narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 1-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,485 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
